title: Zygocactus microsphaericus
taxonomy: Zygocactus microsphaericus is classified within the plant family Cactaceae. It belongs to the genus Zygocactus, which is a group of epiphytic cacti. The species name microsphaericus is derived from the Greek words 'mikros,' meaning small, and 'sphaeros,' meaning sphere, referring to the plant's small spherical stems. This classification places Zygocactus microsphaericus as a unique and distinct species within the cactus family. Its classification helps in understanding its evolutionary history and characteristics.
